examples: One secret I learned very early on was not to brag about success.
When talking about your achievements, be confident but don't exaggerate, brag or lie.
We will leave them to smoke and chatter and brag, since we have no further use for them at present.
On any other broadcast network, 4.9 million viewers would be nothing to brag about.
Only a handful of the experts from our recently concluded contest have reason to brag.
